videoSnippet.title: Rubinstein and Capablanca || The First Game They Ever Played || San Sebastian (1911)
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Akiba Rubinstein vs Jose Raul Capablanca
"If You c1 You've Seen Them All" (game of the day Jun-22-2015)
San Sebastian (1911), San Sebastian ESP, rd 13, Mar-13
Tarrasch Defense: Rubinstein System (D33)  

1.d4 d5 2.Nf3 c5 3.c4 e6 4.cxd5 exd5 5.Nc3 Nc6 6.g3 Be6 7.Bg2 Be7 8.O-O
Rc8 9.dxc5 Bxc5 10.Ng5 Nf6 11.Nxe6 fxe6 12.Bh3 Qe7 13.Bg5 O-O 14.Bxf6 Qxf6 15.Nxd5 Qh6 16.Kg2 Rcd8 17.Qc1 exd5 18.Qxc5 Qd2 19.Qb5 Nd4 20.Qd3 Qxd3 21.exd3 Rfe8 22.Bg4 Rd6 23.Rfe1 Rxe1 24.Rxe1 Rb6 25.Re5 Rxb2 26.Rxd5 Nc6 27.Be6+ Kf8 28.Rf5+ Ke8 29.Bf7+ Kd7 30.Bc4 a6
31.Rf7+ Kd6 32.Rxg7 b5 33.Bg8 a5 34.Rxh7 a4 35.h4 b4 36.Rh6+ Kc5 37.Rh5+ Kb6 38.Bd5 b3 39.axb3 a3 40.Bxc6 Rxb3 41.Bd5 a2 42.Rh6+
